prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a handsome young man with thick, naturally wavy dark hair, light stubble, a sharp jawline, and a warm genuine smile, seated casually on a modern charcoal-gray lounge chair. He wears a perfectly fitted dark espresso brown premium cotton polo shirt with an open collar, paired with tailored taupe chinos and a brown leather belt. His left arm rests naturally on the armrest while his body leans slightly back, creating a relaxed yet confident posture. His head is gently turned toward the right, eyes looking off-camera with a soft, cheerful expression. Golden hour sunlight streams through a nearby window, casting dramatic warm highlights across the right side of his face and torso while leaving the opposite side in soft cinematic shadows. The background features a minimalist luxury interior with smooth beige walls, subtle depth, and warm neutral tones. Soft natural light creates rich contrast, realistic skin texture, detailed facial features, and premium editorial aesthetics. Captured with a full-frame mirrorless camera, 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, ISO 100, 1/320s, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, cinematic color grading, Vogue men's fashion editorial, hyper-realistic skin, natural lighting, ultra-detailed fabric texture, luxury lifestyle photography, photorealistic, 8K HDR. Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a handsome young man with thick textured dark wavy hair, light beard stubble, expressive eyebrows, and a bright natural smile. He is seated comfortably in a modern upholstered armchair with wooden armrests inside a luxurious minimalist living room. He wears a fitted dark chocolate brown polo shirt with an open collar, tailored khaki trousers, and a brown leather belt. His left arm rests casually on the chair while his right hand gently touches the side of his face near the temple, creating an effortless, confident pose. One leg is stretched naturally toward the camera, adding depth and perspective. Warm golden hour sunlight pours through a large window, projecting beautiful geometric window shadows across the cream-colored wall. The light softly illuminates his face from the side, producing rich warm highlights and deep cinematic shadows. A blurred indoor green plant and a dark ceramic coffee mug on a small round table complete the elegant, cozy atmosphere. The scene feels relaxed, luxurious, and naturally candid. Shot on a Sony A7R V, 85mm f/1.8 lens, ISO 100, 1/250s, shallow depth of field, creamy background blur, realistic skin pores, highly detailed hair strands, premium men's fashion editorial, warm cinematic color grading, luxury lifestyle photography, natural window light, hyper-realistic, photorealistic, 8K HDR, magazine-quality composition.

promptZh: 超写实生活方式肖像，主角是一位英俊的年轻男子，留着浓密自然的深色波浪卷发，带有淡淡的胡茬，下颌线轮廓分明，笑容温暖真诚，随意地坐在现代炭灰色休闲椅上。他穿着一件剪裁完美的深浓缩咖啡色优质棉质 Polo 衫，领口微敞，搭配剪裁考究的灰褐色斜纹棉布裤和棕色皮带。他的左臂自然地放在扶手上，身体微微后倾，姿态放松而自信。头部轻微转向右侧，目光看向画外，表情柔和愉悦。黄金时刻的阳光透过窗户射入，在脸部右侧和躯干上投下富有戏剧性的暖色高光，同时在另一侧留下柔和的电影感阴影。背景为极简主义奢华室内空间，墙面呈平滑的米色，具有微妙的深度感和温暖的中性色调。柔和的自然光营造出丰富的对比度、逼真的皮肤质感、细腻的面部特征以及高级的编辑审美。使用全画幅无反相机拍摄，85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，ISO 100，1/320 秒，浅景深，奶油般虚化效果，电影级调色，Vogue 男士时尚专题，超写实皮肤，自然光，超精细织物纹理，奢华生活方式摄影，照片级真实，8K HDR。超写实电影感肖像，主角是一位英俊的年轻男子，拥有浓密且富有质感的深色波浪发，淡淡的胡茬，富有表现力的眉毛，以及明亮自然的笑容。他舒适地坐在豪华极简主义客厅内的一把带有木质扶手的现代软垫扶手椅上。他穿着一件剪裁合身的深巧克力色 Polo 衫，领口微敞，搭配定制卡其色长裤和棕色皮带。他的左臂随意地搭在椅子上，右手轻轻触碰太阳穴附近的脸颊，姿态从容自信。一条腿自然地向镜头方向伸展，增加了深度和透视感。温暖的黄金时刻阳光透过大窗户倾泻而入，在奶油色的墙壁上投射出美丽的几何窗影。光线从侧面柔和地照亮他的脸庞，产生丰富的暖色高光和深邃的电影感阴影。模糊的室内绿植和圆桌上的深色陶瓷咖啡杯，共同营造出优雅舒适的氛围。场景显得放松、奢华且自然随性。使用 Sony A7R V 拍摄，85mm f/1.8 镜头，ISO 100，1/250 秒，浅景深，奶油般背景虚化，真实的皮肤毛孔，高度细腻的发丝，高级男士时尚专题，温暖的电影级调色，奢华生活方式摄影，自然窗光，超写实，照片级真实，8K HDR，杂志级构图。
